dict.string: System Trainer uses the camera to scan food barcodes so you can log meals instantly without typing.
System Trainer reads your steps, sleep, heart rate, workouts, and body measurements from Apple Health to power daily quests, track your progression, and personalize coaching.
System Trainer writes workouts, body weight, water intake, and meal nutrition back to Apple Health so all your fitness data stays in one place.
System Trainer uses your location to track outdoor cardio routes (Patrol mode) so you can see distance, pace, and the path you ran or walked.
System Trainer needs continued location access to keep recording your route while the screen is locked during outdoor cardio sessions.
System Trainer uses motion data to detect workouts and steps when Apple Health is unavailable.
System Trainer uses the advertising identifier only for anonymous analytics about which features players use most. We never share or sell your data.
